'''鈭歾-g-v''' ('''zagava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rike|rike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rike|rike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| zagava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagavithi|zagavithi]] || [[word:zagaviji|zagaviji]] || [[word:zagavishi|zagavishi]] || [[word:zagavi|zagavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagavuthuth|zagavuthuth]] || [[word:zagavujuj|zagavujuj]] || [[word:zagavushush|zagavushush]] || [[word:zagav|zagav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagavuthu|zagavuthu]] || [[word:zagavuju|zagavuju]] || [[word:zagavushu|zagavushu]] || [[word:zagavu|zagavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagavufuth|zagavufuth]] || [[word:zagavufuj|zagavufuj]] || [[word:zagavufush|zagavufush]] || [[word:zagavuf|zagavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagavethe|zagavethe]] || [[word:zagaveje|zagaveje]] || [[word:zagaveshe|zagaveshe]] || [[word:zagave|zagave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagavothoth|zagavothoth]] || [[word:zagavojoj|zagavojoj]] || [[word:zagavoshosh|zagavoshosh]] || [[word:zagav|zagav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagavotho|zagavotho]] || [[word:zagavojo|zagavojo]] || [[word:zagavosho|zagavosho]] || [[word:zagavo|zagavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagavofoth|zagavofoth]] || [[word:zagavofoj|zagavofoj]] || [[word:zagavofosh|zagavofosh]] || [[word:zagavof|zagavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagav忙th忙|zagav忙th忙]] || [[word:zagav忙j忙|zagav忙j忙]] || [[word:zagav忙sh忙|zagav忙sh忙]] || [[word:zagav忙|zagav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagavathath|zagavathath]] || [[word:zagavajaj|zagavajaj]] || [[word:zagavashash|zagavashash]] || [[word:zagav|zagav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagavatha|zagavatha]] || [[word:zagavaja|zagavaja]] || [[word:zagavasha|zagavasha]] || [[word:zagava|zagava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagavafath|zagavafath]] || [[word:zagavafaj|zagavafaj]] || [[word:zagavafash|zagavafash]] || [[word:zagavaf|zagavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zagavasha|zagavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozagavasha|gozagavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizagavasha|gokizagavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zagavn眉sha|zagavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozagavnkn眉sha|gozagavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizagavn眉sha|gokizagavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zagavsh毛sha|zagavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozagavnksh毛sha|gozagavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizagavsh毛sha|gokizagavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagavrosha|zagavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagavnkrosha|gozagavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagavrosha|gokizagavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zagavmusha|zagavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagavnkmusha|gozagavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagavmusha|gokizagavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zagavsherasha|zagavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozagavnksherasha|gozagavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizagavsherasha|gokizagavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zagavngasha|zagavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozagavnkngasha|gozagavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizagavngasha|gokizagavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zagavyasha|zagavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozagavnkyasha|gozagavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizagavyasha|gokizagavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zagavyamasha|zagavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozagavnkyamasha|gozagavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizagavyamasha|gokizagavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagavn眉sh毛sha|zagavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagavnkn眉sh毛sha|gozagavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagavn眉sh毛sha|gokizagavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagavn眉rosha|zagavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagavnkn眉rosha|gozagavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagavn眉rosha|gokizagavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagavn眉musha|zagavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagavnkn眉musha|gozagavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagavn眉musha|gokizagavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagavsh毛n眉sha|zagavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagavnksh毛n眉sha|gozagavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagavsh毛n眉sha|gokizagavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagavsh毛rosha|zagavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagavnksh毛rosha|gozagavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagavsh毛rosha|gokizagavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagavsh毛musha|zagavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagavnksh毛musha|gozagavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagavsh毛musha|gokizagavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagavron眉sha|zagavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagavnkron眉sha|gozagavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagavron眉sha|gokizagavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagavrosh毛sha|zagavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagavnkrosh毛sha|gozagavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagavrosh毛sha|gokizagavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagavromusha|zagavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagavnkromusha|gozagavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagavromusha|gokizagavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagavmun眉sha|zagavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagavnkmun眉sha|gozagavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagavmun眉sha|gokizagavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagavmush毛sha|zagavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagavnkmush毛sha|gozagavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagavmush毛sha|gokizagavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagavmurosha|zagavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagavnkmurosha|gozagavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagavmurosha|gokizagavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zagav|zagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙g忙v|z忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozagav|hozagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙g忙v|hoz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozagav|hohozagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙g忙v|hohoz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zagav|n眉zagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙g忙v|n眉z忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zagav|n眉n眉zagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙g忙v|n眉n眉z忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zagav|n茂zagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙g忙v|n茂z忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zagav|n茂n茂zagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙g忙v|n茂n茂z忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzagav|luzagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙g忙v|luz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzagav|luluzagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙g忙v|luluz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizagav|lizagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙g忙v|liz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizagav|lilizagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙g忙v|liliz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozagav|kozagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙g忙v|koz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozagav|kokozagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙g忙v|kokoz忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezagav|kezagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙g忙v|kez忙g忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezagav|kekezagav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙g忙v|kekez忙g忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
